src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.general_idea: Migrate servlet API imports from javax.servlet to jakarta.servlet for Jakarta EE 9+ compatibility.
src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.why_exists: javax.servlet package is removed in Spring Boot 3 / Jakarta EE 9+; code fails to compile without the new namespace.

src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.general_idea: Remove the entire AuthorizationServerConfiguration class that relied on the deprecated spring-security-oauth2 library, which is incompatible with Spring Security 5+ and Java 17.
src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.why_exists: The class AuthorizationServerConfigurerAdapter and the package org.springframework.security.oauth2.config.annotation.web.configuration were removed in Spring Security 5. Using them causes a compile error (class not found) on JDK 17 with modern Spring Boot versions.

src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.general_idea: The entire AccessConfirmationController class was removed (commented out) as part of the migration away from spring-security-oauth2.
src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.why_exists: The class depends on org.springframework.security.oauth2.provider.AuthorizationRequest and ClientDetailsService, which are removed in the migration to Spring Authorization Server/Spring Security 5.x. Without removal, the code fails to compile due to missing classes.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent from 2.0.0.RELEASE to 3.0.5 to align with Java 17 and modern Spring ecosystem.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x requires Java 17 and uses Jakarta EE namespaces; running on Java 8 or with old Spring dependencies causes classpath and compilation failures.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the project's target Java version property from 1.8 to 17.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.0.5 mandates Java 17; compiling with Java 8 settings will result in missing class errors or incompatible bytecode.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace the legacy spring-security-oauth2 library with the new Spring Authorization Server.
pom.xml.why_exists: The legacy spring-security-oauth2 is deprecated and incompatible with Spring Security 6 (used in Boot 3); code using the old API will fail to compile or run.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update MySQL connector artifact ID to the new naming convention for MySQL 8+.
pom.xml.why_exists: The old artifact ID is deprecated/removed in newer versions; using it may lead to dependency resolution failures or runtime driver issues.

pom.xml.general_idea: Configure maven-compiler-plugin to use Java 17 and annotation processors for Lombok and MapStruct.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without explicit Java 17 source/target and annotation processor paths, the project will fail to compile due to missing generated code (Lombok/MapStruct) or incompatible bytecode.

src/main/resources/application.propertie.general_idea: Update MySQL JDBC driver class to the new com.mysql.cj.jdbc.Driver required for MySQL 8.0+ and newer Connector/J versions.
src/main/resources/application.propertie.why_exists: The old com.mysql.jdbc.Driver is deprecated/removed in newer MySQL Connector/J versions; using it causes ClassNotFoundException or runtime warnings/errors.
